sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 22:04 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if rs=='process_real_claude_response_next':
    status='process_response_selected'
    next_action='read real Claude response and create protocol'
elif rs=='repair_dispatch_result_writer_next':
    # Force a known-valid self probe and harden commit path marker.
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_self_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 force dispatch result writer proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results marker/result'
elif rs=='repair_claude_runtime_state_next':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 Claude runtime state proof retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, parse dispatch result, verify runtime state'
elif rs=='repair_real_claude_response_next':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_response_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 real Claude response proof retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, verify real Claude response excluding blocker files'
else:
    status='unknown_route_noop'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-840 route'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_repair.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_repair.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute BEM-840 Repair | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_repair.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_repair.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-840 selected repair by queuing the relevant proof probe or selecting response processing')
